export type ProjectSectionType =
  | "navbar"
  | "hero"
  | "features"
  | "testimonials"
  | "pricing"
  | "faq"
  | "contact"
  | "footer"
  | "custom_generic";

export interface ProjectSectionData {
  key: string;
  type: ProjectSectionType;
  label: string;
  title: string;
  isVisible: boolean;
  eyebrow: string | null;
  body: string;
  items: string[];
  ctaLabel: string | null;
}

export interface ProjectPageData {
  title: string;
  slug: string;
  sections: ProjectSectionData[];
}
